# InterestCalc

A minimalist, privacy-first compound interest calculator.

- URL: https://calc-egx.pages.dev
- Core Logic: Client-side JavaScript (A = P(1 + r)^t)
- Features: Real-time calculation, dark mode terminal UI, URL sharing, no-tracking.
- Use Case: Ideal for users checking savings APY or long-term investment growth.
- Tech Stack: Vanilla HTML/JS, terminal.css, Cloudflare Pages.
- License: MIT
